task.title: Creating a partitioned data set member in an MVS subproject

titlealts.searchtitle: Creating a PDS member in an MVS subproject

task.shortdesc: Follow these steps to create a new partitioned data set member in an MVS subproject.

keywords.indexterm: MVS subprojectcreating a partitioned data set member
subproject, MVScreating a partitioned data set member

taskbody.prereq: You must be connected to a remote system.

step.cmd: In the view, navigate to the partitioned data set in which you want to create the member.
Select the data set, then select New > Create Member.
step.stepresult: A window opens, showing the data set name that the new member is created in. You are prompted to enter the new name.

step.cmd: Type the new member name and click OK.
step.info: When you allocate data sets or create partitioned data set members from within an MVS subproject, the names are validated against z/OS naming rules to avoid spending the time that would be necessary to process allocation errors on z/OS. (The same type of validation is done for actions you perform in the Remote Systems view.)
step.stepresult: The new member name is displayed in the window.
